title: Agropyron biflorum
intro: Agropyron biflorum, also known as Agropyron cristatum, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae), commonly found in the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. The health benefits of Agropyron biflorum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body, as well as its ability to improve digestive health and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Agropyron biflorum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the production of capsules and tablets.
taxonomy: Agropyron biflorum is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This grass is further classified under the tribe Triticeae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and parts of Canada. Agropyron biflorum is a perennial grass that grows in a variety of habitats, including meadows and rocky outcrops. As a member of the Agropyron genus, it is closely related to other species of grasses within the same family.
